mapper.insert: insert into activity_plan_content (activity_plan_id, knowledge_goal, emotion_goal, materials, space_requirement, preparation_time, staff_tips, general_warning, special_reminder, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user) values (#{activityPlanId}, #{knowledgeGoal}, #{emotionGoal}, #{materials}, #{spaceRequirement}, #{preparationTime}, #{staffTips}, #{generalWarning}, #{specialReminder}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser})
mapper.update:
update activity_plan_content
knowledge_goal=#{knowledgeGoal},
emotion_goal=#{emotionGoal},
materials=#{materials},
space_requirement=#{spaceRequirement},
preparation_time=#{preparationTime},
staff_tips=#{staffTips},
general_warning=#{generalWarning},
special_reminder=#{specialReminder},
update_time=#{updateTime},
update_user=#{updateUser},
where activity_plan_id=#{activityPlanId}
mapper.select: select id, activity_plan_id, knowledge_goal, emotion_goal, materials, space_requirement, preparation_time, staff_tips, general_warning, special_reminder, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user from activity_plan_content where activity_plan_id=#{id}
